title: Makefile: fix install.cni.sudo
body:
github.com/containernetworking/plugins has no build.sh but
build_[linux|windows].sh. Call build_linux.sh directly to fix
install.cni.sudo.

While we're at it, create /opt/cni/bin with 'install' to encapsulate with
privileges.

Fixes: #2153

Signed-off-by: Mikko Ylinen <mikko.ylinen@intel.com>

comments.body:
LGTM but would like someone with a bit more CNI/Makefile knowledge to chime in.

@mythi TYVM for the PR!
:-1: Rejected by too few approved reviews
LGTM is not enough for bors. We need to review and approve.
It's still confusing because we have so many different bots across the projects.
This PR was included in a batch that successfully built, but then failed to merge into master (it was a non-fast-forward update). It will be automatically retried.
Bors does not like this for no reason.  Merging.
